column1: I'll Make a Man Out of You (Mulan)

column2: 哪怕敌人再多 (Nǎpà dírén zài duō)
我也会守着 (Wǒ yě huì shǒuzhe)
谁有那种本领 (Shéi yǒu nà zhǒng běnlǐng)

column1: You're the saddest bunch I ever met
column2: 这种身手也想做士兵 (Zhè zhǒng shēnshǒu yě xiǎng zuò shìbīng)

column1: But you can bet before we're through
column2: 看来我只好指望我 (Kàn lái wǒ zhǐhǎo zhǐwàng wǒ)

column1: Mister I'll make a man out of you
column2: 只有我可以改变你 (Zhǐyǒu wǒ kěyǐ gǎibiàn nǐ)

column1: We must be swift as the coursing river
column2: 行动快速像那江河湍急 (Xíngdòng kuàisù xiàng nà jiānghé tuānjí)

column1: With all the force of a great typhoon
column2: 破坏力像那风暴无情 (Pòhuàilì xiàng nà fēngbào wúqíng)

column1: With all the strength of a raging fire
column2: 满腔热血像那野火压境 (Mǎnqiāng rèxuè xiàng nà yěhuǒ yājìng)

column1: Mysterious as the dark side of the moon
column2: 神出鬼没像那暗夜的噩梦 (Shénchūguǐmò xiàng nà ànyè de èmèng)
